description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult pedestrian with a slim build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. The figure is dressed in a short-sleeved shirt and long pants, with visible shoes on both feet. The head is slightly bowed, and the hairstyle is short and straight, with no visible accessories or facial features. The clothing appears casual and fitted, suitable for everyday urban environments. The figure's posture is rigid and symmetrical, with both arms and legs straight. No objects are being carried or worn, and the overall appearance is that of a typical city dweller.
description: A slim adult pedestrian in a T-pose, wearing casual short-sleeved shirt and long pants, with short straight hair and shoes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and arms extended horizontally, with both legs visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, arm, and leg, with the arm extended forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shirt, and both legs, with arms outstretched.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the head, arm, and leg, mirroring the left side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeved shirt and long pants
